repository.name: JOBIZARD
repository.description: A functional e2e application with a responsive UI design that helps. Job seekers and recruiters to sign up and create an account and login. Job seekers can update their details and take tests, learn about courses, give reviews to companies, generate their CVs, post pictures and blogs. Recruiters can update their profile, see all the job seekers who are registered in their landing page, get recommendations, search,  shortlist for  job seekers according to the required skills and email and chat with job seekers. The users can access the latest skill trend, get salary graph based on job title, tech news and business news. The users can leverage the chatbot to seek support.
